name: Regal Partners Limited
analysis: RPL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.5700, stop A$2.4156, target A$2.9855 (2.69:1) — then trail it.
